---
format: 
  revealjs:
    css: ../styles.css
    slide-number: c/t
    show-slide-number: all
    preview-links: auto
    self-contained: true
    multiplex: false
    incremental: true
    progress: true
    history: true
    hash-type: number
    logo: ../img/rabo_icon_color.png
    theme: "../rabo.scss"
    code-block-background: true
    highlight-style: ayu-mirage
    code-link: false
    code-copy: true
    pagetitle: "RABO Status & Permitting"
    author-meta: "Laura Patterson"
    date-meta: "2026-05-01"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide1.png"  background-size="98%"}

![](../img/rabo_adult_dark_transparent.png){.absolute bottom=0 left=0 width=150}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide2.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide3.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide4.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide5.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide6.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide7.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide8.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide9.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide10.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide11.png"  background-size="98%"}
 
##  {background-image="../img/lp_2026/Slide12.png"  background-size="98%"}
 
## Questions? {background-color="#111111" background-image="../img/artsy_datasheet_rabo.jpg" background-size="cover" background-position="bottom"}
